text: 🔄 Forwarded from Fotros Resistance: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | Summary of Iran’s FM visit to Islamabad: 1. Emphasis on the 10 conditions & full commitment to them. 2. Readiness for rational & fair negotiation. 3. US has no right to set red lines for talks. 4. Iran will not surrender to US excesses (including no naval blockade) 5. The need for Pakistan's neutrality @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Fotros Resistance：🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | 伊朗外交部长访问伊斯兰堡总结：1. 强调10项条件并完全致力于此。2. 为理性且公平的谈判做好准备。3. 美国无权为谈判设定红线。4. 伊朗不会屈服于美国的过分要求（包括不进行海上封锁）。5. 巴基斯坦保持中立的必要性 @FotrosResistancee

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran's Central Headquarters of Hazrat Khatam al-Anbiya warned the U.S. that if they continue their blockade and seizure of Iranian vessels that they will face the reaction of the IRGC. "If the aggressive US military continues its siege, piracy, and maritime robbery in the region, be assured that they will face the reaction of Iran's powerful armed forces. The United States should know that the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran possess greater power and readiness than before to defend sovereignty, territory, and national interests, a power and offensive capability that their army experienced during the Third Imposed War. We are ready and determined to monitor the behavior and movements of enemies in the region and continue managing and controlling the strategic Strait of Hormuz. In the event of another aggression by the American Zionist enemies, we will inflict even more severe damage upon them." Video is made by Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部警告美国，如果他们继续封锁和扣押伊朗船只，将面临伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的反应。“如果咄咄逼人的美军继续在地区内进行围困、海盗行为和海上抢劫，请确信他们将面临伊朗强大武装力量的反应。美国应该知道，伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装力量拥有比以往更强大的力量和准备来捍卫主权、领土和国家利益，这种力量和进攻能力是他们的军队在第三次强加战争中所经历过的。我们已准备好并决心监视敌人在该地区的行为和动向，并继续管理和控制战略性的霍尔木兹海峡。如果美国犹太复国主义敌人再次进行侵略，我们将对他们造成更严重的损害。” 视频由 Grok AI 推文制作

text: WarMonitor For those who use this platform for news, try switching to the “Following” tab. It lets you take control of your feed by showing accounts you follow, instead of the “For You” tab where the algorithm decides what you see. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048116735044120607/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 对于那些使用此平台获取新闻的人，尝试切换到“正在关注”选项卡。它让你通过显示你关注的账户来控制你的信息流，而不是在“为你推荐”选项卡中由算法决定你看到的内容。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048116735044120607/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Pakistan is terrific. I think the field marshal is fantastic, and I think the prime minister of Pakistan is great. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048116027465097294/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：巴基斯坦非常棒。我认为陆军元帅很棒，我认为巴基斯坦总理也很棒。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048116027465097294/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News Trump told reporters that he recieved a fresh "offer" from Iran 10 minutes after canceling the Pakistan meeting. This new proposal was "much better than previous proposals... they offered a lot but not enough", per POTUS. Travel pool 7 gaggle snippets ✈️ Trump dealt with a number of subjects under the wing. Very hard to hear. On crypto, need to build industry to compete with China. On Iran, got another fresh offer 10 minutes after canceling Pakistan meeting. On Fed, still wants investigation of expensive building. Trump boarded the plane at 2:31 pm. Consider this your last message before wheels up. Bart Jansen USA TODAY Sat. Apr. 25, 2:35 PM - White House Press Pool Reports tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 特朗普告诉记者，他在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后收到了伊朗的一份新“提议”。据美国总统称，这份新提案“比之前的提案好得多……他们提供了很多，但还不够”。随行记者团7条简讯 ✈️ 特朗普在机翼下处理了多个议题。很难听清。关于加密货币，需要建立产业以与中国竞争。关于伊朗，在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后又收到了另一份新提议。关于美联储，仍然希望调查昂贵的建筑。特朗普于下午2:31登机。请将此视为起飞前的最后一条消息。Bart Jansen USA TODAY 周六，4月25日，下午2:35 - 白宫记者团报道 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Iran offered a lot, but not enough https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048115162951872635/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：伊朗提供了很多，但还不够 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048115162951872635/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: "Got another fresh offer 10 minutes after canceling Pakistan meeting. We received a new document that was much better. They offered a lot, but not enough." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048114859091304629/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普谈伊朗：“在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后又收到了另一份新提议。我们收到了一份比之前好得多的新文件。他们提供了很多，但还不够。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048114859091304629/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Donald Trump: "The Iranians presented us with an offer — but it was not enough." Trump touched on the cancellation of his representatives' visit to Pakistan and noted that Iran sent a document that did not meet expectations. According to him, about 10 minutes after the visit was canceled, they received a new, improved document, but it was also "not enough." He also told reporters: "We will handle everything by phone and they can call us anytime. All the cards are in our hands. They almost no longer have an army and have no leaders — even we don't know who their leaders are." tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普：“伊朗人向我们提交了一份提议——但还不够。”特朗普谈到了取消其代表访问巴基斯坦一事，并指出伊朗发送的文件未达到预期。据他称，在访问取消约10分钟后，他们收到了一份新的、改进后的文件，但仍然“不够”。他还告诉记者：“我们将通过电话处理一切，他们可以随时打电话给我们。所有的牌都在我们手中。他们几乎不再拥有军队，也没有领导人——甚至我们都不知道他们的领导人是谁。” 推文

text: WarMonitor This is just Trump trying to pretend like he's in control. But like the Boy Who Cried Wolf, people are starting to tune it out as noise. Trump told reporters that he recieved a fresh "offer" from Iran 10 minutes after canceling the Pakistan meeting. This new proposal was "much better than previous proposals... they offered a lot", per POTUS. - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这只是特朗普试图假装他掌控局势。但就像“狼来了”的孩子一样，人们开始将其视为噪音而不再理会。特朗普告诉记者，他在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后收到了伊朗的一份新“提议”。据美国总统称，这份新提案“比之前的提案好得多……他们提供了很多”。 - Faytuks News 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "I'll deal with whoever runs the show... there's no reason to wait 2 days, have people traveling for 16, 17 hours. When they want, they can call me, we have all the cards." "That whole deal is not complicated: Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048113511327297889/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“我会与任何掌权的人打交道……没有理由等两天，让人长途跋涉16、17个小时。当他们想的时候，他们可以打电话给我，我们掌握着所有的牌。”“整个交易并不复杂：伊朗不能拥有核武器。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048113511327297889/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel An Iranian from Tehran says the city is gripped by fear, internet blackouts and heavy security presence, where daily life has been reduced to survival and uncertainty. Adds that distrust in official information is widespread, checkpoints dominate major intersections, and many residents feel like strangers in their own city. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一名来自德黑兰的伊朗人表示，这座城市笼罩在恐惧、互联网中断和严密的安保氛围中，日常生活已缩减为生存和不确定性。他补充说，对官方信息的不信任非常普遍，检查站遍布主要路口，许多居民感觉自己像是在自己的城市里的陌生人。推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. consumer sentiment just hit the lowest level ever recorded in the University of Michigan survey, worse than both the 2008 financial crisis and the COVID collapse. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048112105681764355/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国消费者信心指数刚刚触及密歇根大学调查记录以来的最低水平，比2008年金融危机和新冠疫情崩溃时还要糟糕。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048112105681764355/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Republican Senator Lindsey Graham voiced support for President Donald Trump’s decision to cancel the Witkoff–Kushner visit to Pakistan aimed at further talks with Iran. ▪️ He stated that Tehran responded to the ceasefire extension with attacks on international shipping and continued provocations. ▪️ Graham added that Trump “did everything possible” by extending the ceasefire, but emphasized that the priority now should be establishing strict control over the Strait of Hormuz and ensuring freedom of navigation under international law. 📌 “To achieve this, short-term U.S. military involvement may be necessary. It’s a risk worth taking to restore freedom of navigation in the strait,” Graham said. Video is made by Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 共和党参议员林赛·格雷厄姆表示支持唐纳德·特朗普总统取消维特科夫-库什纳（Witkoff–Kushner）访问巴基斯坦的决定，该访问旨在与伊朗进行进一步谈判。▪️ 他表示，德黑兰以袭击国际航运和持续挑衅来回应停火协议的延长。▪️ 格雷厄姆补充说，特朗普通过延长停火协议“尽了一切可能”，但他强调，现在的优先事项应该是对霍尔木兹海峡建立严格控制，并确保国际法下的航行自由。📌 “为了实现这一点，可能需要短期的美国军事介入。这是为了恢复海峡航行自由而值得冒的风险，”格雷厄姆说。视频由 Grok AI 推文制作

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "You probably heard that we canceled the trip. We have all the cards. We're not going to spend 15hrs in airplanes all the time, going back and forth, to be given a document that was not good enough. So, we'll deal by telephone, and they can call us any time they want." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048110235387117856/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“你们可能听说我们取消了行程。我们掌握着所有的牌。我们不会一直花15个小时在飞机上往返，只为了得到一份不够好的文件。所以，我们将通过电话处理，他们可以在任何他们想的时候打电话给我们。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048110235387117856/video/1 推文

text: Trump: We’re not going to be traveling 15–16 hours to have a meeting with people nobody has ever heard of.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们不会为了和一些闻所未闻的人开会而长途跋涉15到16个小时。

text: Trump: Pakistan is terrific. I think the field marshal is fantastic, and I think the prime minister of Pakistan is great.
text_zh: 特朗普：巴基斯坦非常棒。我认为陆军元帅很出色，巴基斯坦总理也很棒。

text: Trump: Iran offered a lot, but not enough.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗提供了很多，但还不够。

text: Trump: Iran gave us a paper that should have been better. Immediately, when I canceled it, within 10 minutes we got a new paper that was much better.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗给我们的文件本应更好。我取消协议后，10分钟内我们就收到了一份好得多的新文件。

text: Trump: If Iran wants, they can call me; we have all the cards. We won everything.
text_zh: 特朗普：如果伊朗愿意，他们可以给我打电话；我们掌握着所有主动权。我们赢得了所有。

text: Trump: There is tremendous infighting inside Iran; they are probably fighting for leadership. I will deal with whoever we have to.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗内部存在巨大的内斗；他们可能正在争夺领导权。我会与我们必须打交道的任何人打交道。

text: OSINTdefender Following the offensive in Mali by Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) and Azawad Liberation Front (FLA), JNIM has released a statement announcing the capture of key urban centers. Most notably, JNIM directly addressed Russia directly, saying that if they withdraw the Africa Corps from the conflict, they will not target Russian positions in-country. Hayat Tahrir al-Sham (HTS) offered Russia a similar deal during the lightning offensive that overthrew longtime Syrian dictator Bashar al-Assad. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 继“支持伊斯兰与穆斯林阵线”（JNIM）和“阿扎瓦德解放阵线”（FLA）在马里发动攻势后，JNIM发表声明宣布占领了关键城市中心。最值得注意的是，JNIM直接向俄罗斯喊话，称如果他们从冲突地区撤出“非洲军团”，他们将不会针对境内的俄罗斯目标。在推翻叙利亚长期独裁者巴沙尔·阿萨德的闪电战期间，沙姆解放组织（HTS）也曾向俄罗斯提出过类似的交易。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : When Robert Hanssen’s former SVR handler tells you who the Russians are backing in U.S. politics, it’s worth listening. Moscow would root for Vance, not Rubio who is seen as the primary blocker of the RU-US “bilateral normalization”. Also his Venezuela/Cuba obsessive drive back into the US fold won him no friends in Ru. In Rubio we don’t trust…. - Vladimir Frolov tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @michaeldweiss : 当罗伯特·汉森的前SVR联络人告诉你俄罗斯人在美国政治中支持谁时，值得一听。莫斯科会支持万斯，而不是卢比奥，因为卢比奥被视为俄美“双边关系正常化”的主要阻碍者。此外，他执着于将委内瑞拉/古巴拉回美国阵营的举动在俄罗斯也没为他赢得任何朋友。我们不信任卢比奥…… - 弗拉基米尔·弗罗洛夫 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: I just cancelled the trip of my representatives going is Islamabad, Pakistan, to meet with the Iranians. Too much time wasted on traveling, too much work! Besides which, there is tremendous infighting and confusion within their “leadership.” Nobody knows who is in charge, including them. Also, we have all the cards, they have none! If they want to talk, all they have to do is call!!! tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：我刚刚取消了我的代表前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡会见伊朗人的行程。在旅行上浪费了太多时间，工作太多了！此外，他们的“领导层”内部存在巨大的内斗和混乱。没人知道谁负责，包括他们自己。而且，我们掌握了所有筹码，他们一个都没有！如果他们想谈，他们只需要打个电话！！！推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran's Central Headquarters of Hazrat Khatam al-Anbiya warned the U.S. that if they continue their blockade and seizure of Iranian vessels that they will face the reaction of the IRGC. "If the aggressive US military continues its siege, piracy, and maritime robbery in the region, be assured that they will face the reaction of Iran's powerful armed forces. The United States should know that the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran possess greater power and readiness than before to defend sovereignty, territory, and national interests, a power and offensive capability that their army experienced during the Third Imposed War. We are ready and determined to monitor the behavior and movements of enemies in the region and continue managing and controlling the strategic Strait of Hormuz. In the event of another aggression by the American Zionist enemies, we will inflict even more severe damage upon them." @wfwitness
